race.comment: MIMMY'S SECRET (3) is back from a spell of 11 weeks. Scored a good win at her final run last campaign at Nanango over 1200m. Gets 1.5kg off with the claim and comes here with definite claims. COBBO (2) held on well to finish second last start over 1050m at Rockhampton, beaten only a head. Has the ability to play a significant role. LADY CONSORT (10) grows a leg for hoop Olzard who has three wins from as many steers. Has to be included in calculations while fresh. MR ENCORE (5) is on a seven day back-up and was in the money last start running third at Warwick. Strips fitter and expected to run well again.
